---
title: "Mary Isabel Yonge"
---

## Mary Isabel Yonge

**Dates:** (d. 1915)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

The second daughter of the Rev. John Eyre Yonge, she married (1872), the Rev. Denys Nelson Yonge, Vicar of Boreham, Chelmsford (no relation). [LG 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 28th [1880s?]
- Letter from February 21st [1880s?]
- Letter from Febry 3d [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
